positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a celestial forest meeting a deep ocean tide. The central focus is a graceful, bioluminescent whale breaching amidst crystalline flora and glowing, swirling nebulae. The style is a blend of Art Nouveau curvature and contemporary linework, using limited, high-contrast colors: deep midnight indigo, electric teal, soft lavender, and accents of glowing gold. The composition is balanced and symmetrical, featuring strong silhouettes of stylized kelp and whale flukes against a radiant, ethereal background. Print-optimized, high contrast, vector art feel, ideal for screen printing on apparel. Clean lines, perfect symmetry, pop art energy.
negative: blurry, grainy, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, poorly drawn, artifacts, noise, oversaturated
